nasb.text: So the sons of Israel shall observe the sabbath, to celebrate the sabbath throughout their generations as a perpetual covenant.’

esv.text: Therefore the people of Israel shall keep the Sabbath, observing the Sabbath throughout their generations, as a covenant forever.

cnv.text: 所以，以色列人要守安息日，他們世世代代要遵行安息日的規例，作為永遠的約。

ccb.text: 因此，以色列人世世代代都要守安息日，作为永久的约，
